hero.label: Lake Orta, Piedmont — Italy
hero.title: Villa Volpe
hero.subtitle: Everything you need, on the sunny side of Lake Orta. Three meters from crystal clear water.

features.title: By the Lake
features.text: Where morning light meets water. Your private beach, just steps away.

features.title: Sunlit Garden
features.text: A private space for reading, resting, and watching the light change over the water.

features.title: Private Parking
features.text: Perhaps the coolest parking spot in the world. Spacious and right above the villa.

introduction.label: About the Property
introduction.title: A Design Glass Cube on Lake Orta
paragraphs: Nestled on the picturesque east shore of Lake Orta, Villa Volpe is a truly unique property. The villa, a design glass cube surrounded by a breathtakingly landscaped garden, is situated just three meters from the crystal clear waters of the lake, with a view of the illuminated island of San Giulio at night.
65 square meters of beautifully appointed living space. Two king-size bedrooms. A fully equipped kitchen. And outside, your private oasis: a lush garden that leads to your own beach.

location.title: Where Piedmont Meets the Lake
location.subtitle: Conveniently located 80 km from Milan, 45 km from Milano Malpensa Airport, and 120 km from Turin. Via Novara 38, Orta San Giulio 28016, Italy.
